LAW AND MOTION 302, RULING: THE COURT ADOPTED THE TENTATIVE RULING. RECEIVER KEVIN SINGER'S MOTION FOR ORDER 1) APPROVING AND SETTLING RECEIVER'S FINAL REPORT AND ACCOUNTING 2) APPROVING FINAL COMPENSATION AND REIMBURSEMENT OF COSTS FOR RECEIVER 3) EXONERATING ALL BONDS 4) APPROVING AND RATIFYING ALL OF RECEIVER'S ACTS AND TRANSACTIONS 5) RETAINING JURISDICTION REGARDING THIS RECEIVERSHIP IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; NOT REPORTED.

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Order Approving And Settling Receiver'S Final Report And Accounting 2) Approving Final Compensation And Reimbursement Of Costs For Receiver 3) Exonerating All Bonds; Etc; Dec And Pos
Off Calendar Aug-23-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Kevin Singer, Tel. 415.848.2984, Receiver and moving party;
No other appearance.

RULING: The court adopted the tentative ruling. RECEIVER KEVIN SINGER'S Motion For Order 1) Approving And Settling Receiver's Final Report And Accounting 2) Approving Final Compensation And Reimbursement Of Costs For Receiver 3) Exonerating All Bonds 4) Approving and Ratifying All of Receiver's Acts and Transactions 5) Retaining Jurisdiction Regarding this Receivership is Granted. No opposition filed. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not Reported.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-09-2012 Continued To Oct-10-12 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 610
